title: UBUSHINJACYAHA v NDAYISENGA
text:
UBUSHINJACYAHA v NDAYISENGA
[Rwanda URUKIKO RW’UBUJURIRE - RPAA 00628/2024/CA (Gakwaya, P.J.) 30 Ukuboza
2025]
Amategeko agenga imanza nshinjabyaha – Igihano – Mu gihe ujurira yahawe igihano cy’igifungo
cy’imyaka cumi n’itanu (15), ku cyaha gihanishwa igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu, nta mpamvu
yo gusuzuma ishingiro ry’impamvu nyoroshacyaha azamura kuko ku bushake
bw’Umushingamategeko, n’ubwo hakwemezwa impamvu nyoroshyacyaha, icyaha giteganyirijwe
igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu, ntigishobora kugabanywa ngo kijye munsi y’igihano cy’igifungo
cy’imyaka cumi itanu (15).
Incamake y’ikibazo: Ubushinjacyaha bwareze Ndayisenga mu Rukiko Rwisumbuye rwa
Nyarugenge icyaha cyo gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi nyuma yuko
afashwe na polisi ishami rishinzwe kurwanya ibiyobyabwenge afite udupfunyika makumyabiri
n’icyenda (29) tw’urumogi, yazanirwaga n’uwitwa Olivier utuye i Gikondo, akarurangura
akarucuruza. Urwo Rukiko rwaciye urubanza rwemeza ko uregwa ahamwa n’icyaha cyo
gufatanwa no gucuruza urumogi, rumuhanisha igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu n’ihazabu
y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni makumyabiri n’eshanu (25.000.000 Frw).
Ndayisenga yajuririye Urukiko Rukuru, avuga ko yahanishijwe ibihano birebire kandi kuva mu
ntangiriro yaremeraga icyaha akaba atarigeze agora ubutabera, kandi ko gufungwa byamugizeho
ingaruka zikomeye kubera ko yari akiri muto ariko ko amaze kugororoka akaba asaba imbabazi
no kugabanyirizwa ibihano. Urwo Rukiko rwaciye urubanza, rwo rwemeza ko hari impamvu
nyoroshyacyaha zagombaga gutuma Ndayisenga agabanyirizwa igihano, nko kuba ari ubwa mbere
akurikiranyweho icyaha ku buryo buzwi, kuba ingano y’urumogi yafatanywe ari nto cyane no kuba
byarahise bifatirwa hagategekwa ko bitwikwa, rumuhanisha igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 15
n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni ebyiri (2.000.000 Frw).
Ndayisenga yajuririye Urukiko rw’Ubujurire avuga ko akomeje gutakamba asaba kongera
kugabanyirizwa igihano kuko ari ubwa mbere akurikiranywe mu Nkiko, ko yemera icyaha ku
buryo budashidikanywaho, agisabira imbabazi, ko nta ngaruka zikomeye cyateje.
Ubushinjacyaha bwo buvuga ko Ndayisenga nta kindi anenga urubanza uretse gusaba
kugabanyirizwa igihano kandi icyo yahanishijwe aricyo gito cya nyuma Urukiko rutajya munsi.
Busaba uru Rukiko kwemeza ko nta gihindutse ku mikirize y’urwo rubanza.
Incamake y’icyemezo: Mu gihe ujurira yahawe igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’itanu (15),
ku cyaha gihanishwa igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu, nta mpamvu yo gusuzuma ishingiro
ry’impamvu nyoroshacyaha azamura kuko ku bushake bw’Umushingamategeko, n’ubwo
hakwemezwa impamvu nyoroshyacyaha, icyaha giteganyirijwe igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu,
ntigishobora kugabanywa ngo kijye munsi y’igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka cumi itanu (15).
Ubujurire nta shingiro bufite.
Amategeko yashingiweho:

Ingingo ya 2 y’Itegeko N° 059/2023 ryo ku wa 4/12/2023 rihindura Itegeko N° 68/2018 ryo ku
wa 30/8/2018 riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange.
Imanza zifashishijwe:
Ubushinjacyaha vs Nsabimana alias Sankara n’Abandi, RPA 00060/2021/CA rwaciwe
n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 4/4/2022.
Urubanza
I. IMITERERE Y’URUBANZA
[1] Ku wa 15/10/2019, Ndayisenga Samuel yafashwe na polisi ishami rishinzwe kurwanya
ibiyobyabwenge afite udupfunyika makumyabiri n’icyenda (29) tw’urumogi, yazanirwaga
n’uwitwa Olivier utuye i Gikondo, akarurangura akarucuruza, akaba yarafashwe ari i Gahanga
yerekeza i Kinyinya agiye kurugurisha k’uwitwa Barafinda.
[2] Iperereza rirangiye, Ubushinjacyaha bwareze Ndayisenga Samuel mu Rukiko
Rwisumbuye rwa Nyarugenge icyaha cyo gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi,
busaba ko cyamuhama agahanishwa igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu n’ihazabu ya mafaranga y’u
Rwanda miliyoni makumyabiri n’eshanu (25.000.000 Frw).
[3] Ndayisenga Samuel yaburanye yemera ko anywa urumogi gusa, ariko ko atarucuruza, ko
ibyo yemeye mu iperereza by’uko arucuruza yabitewe n’igihunga.
[4] Mu rubanza no RP 001447/2019/TGI/NYGE rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rwisumbuye rwa
Nyarugenge ku wa 30/10/2020, rushingiye ku mvugo z’umutangabuhamya Ntibashirakahe
Onesme, ku nyandikomvugo y’ibyabonywe n’Umugenzacyaha, ku nyandikomvugo
y’ibyafatiriwe, ku kwemera icyaha cyo gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge Ndayisenga Samuel yakoreye
mu Bugenzacyaha no mu Bushinjacyaha, rwemeje ko ahamwa n’icyaha cyo gufatanwa no
gucuruza urumogi, rumuhanisha igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u
Rwanda miliyoni makumyabiri n’eshanu (25.000.000 Frw).
[5] Ndayisenga Samuel yajuririye Urukiko Rukuru, avuga ko yahanishijwe ibihano birebire
kandi kuva mu ntangiriro yaremeraga icyaha akaba atarigeze agora ubutabera, kandi ko gufungwa
byamugizeho ingaruka zikomeye kubera ko yari akiri muto ariko ko amaze kugororoka akaba
asaba imbabazi no kugabanyirizwa ibihano.
[6] Mu rubanza no RPA 01217/2020/HC/KIG rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rukuru, ku wa 21/5/2024,
rushingiye ku ngingo ya 60 y’Itegeko nº 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/8/2018 riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano
muri rusange, nk’uko yahinduwe n’iya 21 (a) y’Itegeko nº 059/2023 ryo ku wa 4/12/2023 no ku
ngingo ya 49 y’iryo Tegeko, rwemeje ko hari impamvu nyoroshyacyaha zagombaga gutuma
Ndayisenga Samuel agabanyirizwa igihano, nko kuba ari ubwa mbere akurikiranyweho icyaha ku
1 iteganya ko: “Iyo umucamanza yemeje impamvu nyoroshyacyaha, ashobora kugabanya igihano cy’igifungo cya
burundu ariko ntikijye munsi y’igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 15, naho ihazabu ikaba ishobora kugabanywa kugeza
kuri ¼ y’ihazabu ntoya iteganywa n’itegeko”.

buryo buzwi, kuba ingano y’urumogi yafatanywe ari nto cyane no kuba byarahise bifatirwa
hagategekwa ko bitwikwa, rumuhanisha igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 15 n’ihazabu
y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni ebyiri (2.000.000 Frw).
[7] Ku wa 27/5/2024, Ndayisenga Samuel yajuririye Urukiko rw’Ubujurire avuga ko akomeje
gutakamba asaba kongera kugabanyirizwa igihano kuko ari ubwa mbere akurikiranywe mu Nkiko,
ko yemera icyaha ku buryo budashidikanywaho, agisabira imbabazi, ko nta ngaruka zikomeye
cyateje kandi ko yamaze kugororoka, akaba aramutse agabanyirijwe igihano agataha, atazongera
kwishora muri ibyo bikorwa.
[8] Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko Ndayisenga Samuel nta kindi anenga urubanza uretse gusaba
kugabanyirizwa igihano kandi icyo yahanishijwe aricyo gito cya nyuma Urukiko rutajya munsi,
hakurikijwe ibiteganywa n’ingingo ya 60 y’Itegeko nº 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/8/2018 nk’uko
yahinduwe n’ingingo ya 2 y’Itegeko nº 059/2023 ryo ku wa 4/12/2023 riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano
muri rusange n’umurongo wafashwe mu manza2 zitandukanye zaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire
uvuga ko iyo hari impamvu nyoroshyacyaha, icyaha gihanishwa igifungo cya burundu n’ihazabu,
gishobora kugabanywa ariko ntikijye munsi y’imyaka 15 n’ihazabu ntijye munsi ya ¼ y’ihazabu
nto iteganyijwe, busaba uru Rukiko kwemeza ko nta gihindutse ku mikirize yurwo rubanza.
[9] Urubanza rwahawe no RPAA 00628/2024/CA, ruburanishwa ku wa 16/12/2025,
Ndayisenga Samuel yunganiwe na Me Ruberwa N. Silas, Ubushinjacyaha buhagarariwe na
Bunyoye Grâce, Umushinjacyaha ku rwego rw’Igihugu.
[10] Harebwe imyanzuro n’imiburanire y’ababuranyi ikibazo kigomba gusuzumwa muri uru
rubanza kikaba ari ukumenya niba Ndayisenga Samuel akwiye kongera kugabanyirizwa igihano.
II. IKIBAZO KIGIZE URUBANZA N’ISESENGURA RYACYO
Kumenya niba Ndayisenga Samuel akwiye kongera kugabanyirizwa igihano
[11] Ndayisenga Samuel avuga ko akomeje gutakambira uru Rukiko yajuririye arusaba ko mu
bubasha ruhabwa n’amategeko rwaca inkoni izamba rukongera kumugabanyiriza igihano kuko
igihe cy’imyaka irindwi (7) amaze afunzwe yamaze kugororoka.
[12] Me Ruberwa N. Silas, umwunganira, yongeraho ko Urukiko Rukuru rwagombaga
kumuhana rushingiye ku ngingo ya 60 y’Itegeko no 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/8/2018 riteganya ibyaha
n’ibihano kuko ariryo ryari kumworohereza agahanishwa igihano gito kiri munsi y’icyo yahawe
hashingiwe ku ngingo ya 2 y’Itegeko no 059/2023 ryo ku wa 4/12/2023 riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano
muri rusange ryaje nyuma y’uko akora icyaha, ko rero hakurikijwe ihame ry’impurirane
z’amategeko ahana, rimwe ryariho icyaha gikorwa n’iryasohotse mu Igazeti ya Leta, nyuma y’uko
gikorwa, hakurikizwa iritanga igihano gito, nk’uko byanatanzweho umurongo n’Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire mu manza zitandukanye, rugendeye kuri iryo hame hemezwa ko Itegeko ryorohereza
uregwa ariryo rikurikizwa, kandi rushingiye kuri iyo ngingo rwemeza kandi ko mu bwigenge
bw’umucamanza n’umutima nama we, ntacyamubuza kongera kugabanyiriza uregwa igihano.
2 urubanza no. RPAA 00885/2024/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 16/5/2025 haburana Ubushinjacyaha
na Nshimiyimana Eric (igika cya 18).

[13] Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko uretse kuba asaba kongera kugabanyirizwa igihano, nta kindi
Ndayisenga Samuel anenga urubanza, ko kandi ibivugwa n’umwunganizi we by’uko hari
gushingirwa ku ngingo ya 60 y’Itegeko ryavuzwe haruguru, nta shingiro bifite kuko mu gace ka
13 k’urubanza rujuririrwa, Urukiko rwagaragaje ko ingingo ya 60 y’Itegeko nº 68/2018 ryo ku wa
30/8/2018 yahinduwe n’ingingo ya 2 y’Itegeko nº 059/2023 ryo ku wa 4/12/2023 riteganya ibyaha
n’ibihano muri rusange, ko rero imirongo yose yari ishingiye ku ngingo ya 60 yavuyeho3, bukaba
bubona nta makosa Urukiko rwakoze, bityo ko hakwiye kwemezwa ko nta gihindutse ku mikirize
y’urubanza rwajuririwe.
UKO URUKIKO RUBIBONA
[14] Impaka kuri iki kibazo zishingiye ku kumenya niba Ndayisenga Samuel akwiye kongera
kugabanyirizwa igihano agahabwa ikiri munsi y’igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’itanu (15) n’ihazabu
y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni ebyiri (2.000.000 Frw) yahanishijwe.
[15] Nk’uko kandi byemejwe mu rubanza nº RPA 00060/2021/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire ku wa 4/4/2022, haburana Ubushinjacyaha na Nsabimana Callixte bakunze kwita
Sankara na bagenzi be4 , iyo uregwa nta kindi anenga urubanza yajuririye, uretse kuvuga gusa ko
atagabanyirijwe igihano bihagije, buri mucamanza ku rwego urwo arirwo rwose, yemerewe
gutanga igihano mu bushishozi bwe kijyanye n’uburemere bw’icyaha n’ingaruka zacyo (……),
cyakora mu bujurire Umucamanza akaba agomba kuzirikana ko yemerewe gusa guhindura igihano
cyatanzwe n’Umucamanza wo mu Rukiko rubanza ari uko amaze kugaragaza ko urwo Rukiko
rwaba rwarakoresheje nabi Itegeko cyangwa ubushishozi bwarwo mu gutanga igihano.
[16] Nk’uko byemejwe mu rubanza no RPAA 01059/2024/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire ku wa 26/2/2025 no mu rubanza n° RPAA 00729/2024/CA rwaciwe ku wa
28/3/2025, harebwe ibiteganywa n’ingingo ya 60, agace ka (a), y’Itegeko nº 68/2018 ryo ku wa
30/8/2018 riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange, nk’uko ryahinduwe kugeza ubu, ku bushake
bw’Umushingamategeko byateganyijwe ko uwakoze icyaha gihanishwa igihano cy’igifungo cya
burundu, igihe hemejwe impamvu nyoroshyacyaha, adashobora kugabanyirizwa igihano
cy’igifungo kiri munsi y’imyaka cumi itanu (15), kuko aricyo gihano gito giteganywa n’Itegeko.
[17] Nk’uko bigaragara mu gace ka cumi na gatatu (13) na ka cumi na kane (14) tw’urubanza
rujuririrwa, Urukiko Rukuru rwasobanuye ko rushingiye ku murongo watanzwe n’Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire mu rubanza no RPAA 00157/2022/CA5, rwemeje ko rudashobora gushingira ku
mirongo yatanzwe mu rubanza no RS/INCONST/SPEC 00003/2019/SC n’urubanza no RPAA
00032/2019/CA, kimwe n’izindi manza zagendeye muri uyu murongo, kuko zaciwe hakurikijwe
ingingo ya 60 y’Itegeko n° 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/8/2018 riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange
yahinduwe n’ingingo ya 2 y’Itegeko n° 059/2023 ryo ku wa 4/12/2023, ari nayo igomba
gukurikizwa, rwemeje ko n’ubwo icyaha cyo gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge Ndayisenga Samuel
3 Urubanza no RPAA 00834/2024/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 28/5/2025 haburana Ubushinjacyaha
na Habumugisha Alexis (igika cya 32).
4 Reba urubanza nº RPA 00060/2021/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 4/4/2022, haburana Ubushinjacyaha
na Nsabimana Callixte na bagenzi be, mu gika cya 252 na 254.
5 rwaciwe ku wa 22/12/2023, haburana Ubushinjacyaha na Munyaribanje Vicent. narwo rwashingiye ku murongo
wafashwe mu rubanza nº RPAA 00048/2020/CA, rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 26/05/2022 haburana
Ubushinjacyaha na Bimenyimana

yahamijwe gihanishwa igifungo cya burundu n’ihazabu ishobora kugera ku mafaranga
30.000.000, ko ariko hari impamvu zari gutuma agabanyirizwa igihano, nko kuba ari ubwa mbere
akurikiranyweho icyaha ku buryo buzwi no kuba ingano y’ibiyobyabwenge yafatanywe
(udupfunyika 29) ari ntoya cyane kandi bikaba byarahise bifatwa hagategekwa ko bitwikwa,
rumugabanyiriza igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 25 yari yahawe ku rwego rwa mbere,
rumuhanisha igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’itanu (15) n’ihazabu y’amafaranga miliyoni
ebyiri (2.000.000 Frw).
[18] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga ibivugwa na Ndayisenga Samuel ko mu kumuhana,
Urukiko Rukuru rwakoze ikosa ryo gushingira ku Itegeko n° 059/2023 ryo ku wa 4/12/2023, aho
gushingira ku Itegeko n° 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/8/2018 riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange,
ryakoreshwaga ubwo yakoraga icyaha aregwa, kuko ari ryo riteganya igihano cyoreheje,
bitahabwa agaciro kuko ku birebana n’igabanyagihano, ingingo ya 60 y’Itegeko n° 68/2018 ryo
ku wa 30/8/2018 nk’uko yari yanditswe yateganyaga ko iyo hari impamvu zigabanya ububi
bw’icyaha, igihano cyo gufungwa burundu gishobora kugabanywa ariko ntikije munsi y’imyaka
makumyabiri n’itanu (25), mu gihe iyo ngingo ya 60 nk’uko yahinduwe n’Itegeko n° 059/2023
ryo ku wa 4/12/2023, iteganya ko icyo gihe, igifungo cya burundu gishobora kugabanywa ariko
ntikijye munsi y’igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’itanu (15), bivuze ko ingingo ya 60 nk’uko
yahinduwe mu mwaka wa 2023 ari yo imworohereza.
[19] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga kandi ubusabe bwa Ndayisenga Samuel bwo kongera
kugabanyirizwa igihano cy’igifungo kugeza munsi y’igihano gito giteganywa n’Itegeko ashingiye
ku mpamvu nyoroshyacyaha agaragaza no ku murongo watanzwe mu manza zitandukanye zaciwe
n’uru Rukiko, nta gaciro bukwiye guhabwa kuko hashingiwe ku murongo wagaragajwe haruguru,
mu gihe igihano cy’igigfungo yahawe, ni ukuvuga igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’itanu (15), aricyo
gito Itegeko riteganya, nta mpamvu yo gusuzuma niba impamvu nyoroshyacyaha agaragaza
zashingirwaho akongera kugabanyirizwa igihano cy’igifungo yahawe, kubera ko harebwe
ibiteganywa n’ingingo ya 60, agace ka (a), y’Itegeko nº 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/8/2018 riteganya
ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange, nk’uko ryahinduwe kugeza ubu, ku bushake
bw’Umushingamategeko byateganyijwe ko uwakoze icyaha gihanishwa igihano cy’igifungo cya
burundu n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda arenza miliyoni makumyabiri (20.000.000 Frw)
ariko atarenze miliyoni mirongo itatu (30.000.000 Frw), igihe hemejwe impamvu nyoroshyacyaha,
adashobora kugabanyirizwa igihano cy’igifungo kiri munsi y’imyaka cumi itanu (15), kubera ko
uretse n’ibyo, hanarebwe imigendekere yacyo rusanga gikwiranye n’icyaha yakoze, bityo
ubujurire bwe nta shingiro bufite.
[20] Kubera izo mpamvu zose, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga ubujurire bwa Ndayisenga
Samuel nta shingiro bufite.
III. ICYEMEZO CY’URUKIKO
[21] Rwemeje ko ubujurire bwatanzwe na Ndayisenga Samuel nta shingiro bufite;
[22] Rwemeje ko nta gihindutse ku mikirize y’urubanza n° RPA 01217/2020/HC/KIG rwaciwe
n’Urukiko Rukuru, ku wa 21/5/2024;

[23] Rwemeje ko igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’itanu (15) n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u
Rwanda miliyoni ebyiri (2.000.000 Frw) yahanishijwe kigumyeho.
keywords: Igihe ujurira yahawe igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’itanu (15)
ku cyaha gihanishwa igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu
